title: Project Setup, Dependencies, and Base UI Primitives
summary: Install required libraries (framer-motion, react-hook-form, zod, lucide-react), configure shadcn/ui, set up foundational components (Button, Input, Textarea, Label, Form, Accordion, Dialog), establish dark/edgy theme in Tailwind, and create static data mock file lib/data.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: Dependencies installed without errors. Shadcn UI primitives exist. lib/data.ts exports typed mock data. Tailwind configured for dark mode.

title: Layout, Navbar, and Footer Implementation
summary: Create the responsive sticky Navbar with anchor links and mobile menu toggle. Create the Footer with social links, privacy/TOS stubs. Integrate into app/layout.tsx.
acceptanceCriteria: Navbar is sticky and displays links correctly on desktop and mobile. Footer displays social links. app/layout.tsx wraps children with Navbar and Footer.

title: Implement Hero and About/Artists Sections
summary: Build HeroSection.tsx with a background image, typography, and CTA button. Build AboutArtistsSection.tsx mapping over artist mock data to display cards with bio, styles, and image.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section renders large banner with readable text and clickable CTA. About section displays at least 2 artist profiles. Responsive on mobile and desktop.

title: Implement Services/Pricing and FAQ Sections
summary: Build ServicesPricingSection.tsx displaying list/grid of services and base pricing. Build FAQSection.tsx using Shadcn Accordion to display common questions and aftercare instructions.
acceptanceCriteria: Services listed clearly. FAQ section renders functional accordion that expands and collapses. Includes aftercare info.

title: Implement Interactive Portfolio Gallery
summary: Build PortfolioGallerySection.tsx with category filtering. Implement a click-to-open Lightbox modal using Shadcn Dialog to show full-size images.
acceptanceCriteria: Gallery renders a grid of images. Clicking filters updates displayed images. Clicking an image opens a modal displaying larger image. Responsive grid.

title: Implement Contact Form and Location Details
summary: Build ContactBookingSection.tsx with booking form using react-hook-form and zod (Name, Email, Phone, Preferred Artist, Description, File Upload placeholder). Implement mock submission handling. Include studio location info, hours, and map iframe.
acceptanceCriteria: Form validates required fields. Displays validation errors if submitted empty. Simulates submission delay and shows success message. Includes location, hours, phone, and email.

title: Page Assembly, Framer Motion Animations, and Polish
summary: Assemble all sections in app/page.tsx. Add Framer Motion scroll/entry animations. Ensure images use next/image. Run Lighthouse audits to confirm 90+ scores.
acceptanceCriteria: app/page.tsx renders all sections in order. Sections animate smoothly on scroll. No browser console errors. Lighthouse scores are 90+ for Performance, Accessibility, and Best Practices.
